subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the incomparable Beloved, Who is worthy and befitting of all glory, for from time immemorial and unto everlasting ages, through the fragrances of the Most Exalted Pen, the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب بیزوالی را لایق و سزاست که لم یزل و لایزال از نفحات قلم اعلی اهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions
